ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "title_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the film */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross earnings of the film */,
  "content_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film (e.g., PG-13, R) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of production */,
  "profit" REAL /* Profit generated from the film */,
  "avg_rating" REAL /* Average rating across various platforms */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "producer" TEXT /* Producer of the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company */,
  "runtime_minutes" INTEGER /* Runtime in minutes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "facebook_likes" INTEGER /* Number of Facebook likes for the actor */,
  "twitter_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Twitter followers for the actor */,
  "instagram_followers" INTEGER /* Number of Instagram followers for the actor */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the actor */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_actors" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role played by the actor in the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for box office stats entry */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "weekend_gross" REAL /* Gross income for the opening weekend */,
  "total_gross" REAL /* Total gross income to date */,
  "week_number" INTEGER /* Week number since release */,
  "opening_weekend_date" TEXT /* Date of the opening weekend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_stats_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre (e.g., Action, Comedy) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genre_mapping" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, production, marketing, finance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the user (e.g., view_films, edit_films, delete_films) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role", "permission")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_locations_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
column_names: Rating of the film (e.g., PG-13, R)
Number of Facebook likes for the actor
Number of Twitter followers for the actor

Role played by the actor in the film
